_publications._publicationTitle: Tumor growth of neurofibromin-deficient cells is driven by decreased respiration and hampered by NAD

_contextSnippet: We observe a marked nuclear localization of the transcription factor HIF1α in xenografted sMPNST cells... Immunohistochemical analysis of HIF1α expression in tumor samples
details: Successfully detected marked nuclear localization of HIF1α in xenografted sMPNST cells by immunohistochemical analysis
